assertions.assertion: Warns against using in-memory stores in production
assertions.rationale: Explicit section explains why in-memory is not suitable for production.

assertions.assertion: The store class has a FindByEntityIdAsync method that accepts a string entityId and CancellationToken
assertions.rationale: FindByEntityIdAsync(string entityId, CancellationToken cancellationToken) is implemented.

assertions.assertion: Uses EF Core (DbContext) for data access
assertions.rationale: SamlDbContext with DbSet and EF Core is used.
